description: Server's return status for a QTRANS query (GET/STT/STP). Per Documents/Protocol/query.md, every message type has an RTS_ form for error returns. A single int8: 0 = success, 1 = error.

fields.name: status
fields.description: 0 = success (the requested operation completed). 1 = error (request rejected or failed). Other values are reserved; receivers SHOULD treat any non-zero value as error.
